Definition: Diacrisia sannio genome assembly, chromosome: 11
Description: Diacrisia sannio genome assembly, chromosome: 11
Taxonomy_y: Eukaryota; Metazoa; Ecdysozoa; Arthropoda; Hexapoda; Insecta; Pterygota; Neoptera; Endopterygota; Lepidoptera; Glossata; Ditrysia; Noctuoidea; Erebidae; Arctiinae; Diacrisia
Assembly: The assembly ilDiaSann1.hap2.1 is based on 56x PacBio data and Arima2 Hi-C data generated by Project Psyche (https://www.projectpsyche.org/). The assembly process included the following sequence of steps: initial PacBio assembly generation with Hifiasm in Hi-C integrated assembly mode, and Hi-C based scaffolding with YaHS. The mitochondrial genome was assembled using MitoHiFi. Finally, each haplotype assembly was analysed and manually improved using TreeVal. Chromosome-scale scaffolds confirmed by the Hi-C data have been named in order of size. Z chromosome identified based BUSCO gene painting with ancestral Merian elements~(https://doi.org/10.1038/s41559-024-02329-4) and read coverage.

Definition: Vulgichneumon bimaculatus genome assembly, chromosome: 8
Description: Vulgichneumon bimaculatus genome assembly, chromosome: 8
Taxonomy_y: Eukaryota; Metazoa; Ecdysozoa; Arthropoda; Hexapoda; Insecta; Pterygota; Neoptera; Endopterygota; Hymenoptera; Apocrita; Ichneumonoidea; Ichneumonidae; Ichneumoninae; Vulgichneumon
Assembly: The assembly iyVulBima1.1 is based on 147x PacBio data and Arima2 Hi-C data generated by the Darwin Tree of Life Project~(https://www.darwintreeoflife.org/). The assembly process included the following sequence of steps: initial PacBio assembly generation with Hifiasm, and Hi-C based scaffolding with YaHS. The mitochondrial genome was assembled using MitoHiFi and OATK. Finally, the primary assembly was analysed and manually improved using TreeVal. Chromosome-scale scaffolds confirmed by the Hi-C data have been named in order of size. The exact order and orientation of the contigs on chromosome 7 (11.6Mb - 17.4Mb) and chromosome 12 (10.3Mb - 15.6Mb) are unknown. A large number of centromeric repeats is in the unlocalised sequences.
